name: Implementation Guidance for the Trusted Internet Connections (TIC) 3.0 Initiative
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-224 — TIC 3.0 implementation guidance for federal agencies. Companion to CISA's TIC 3.0 program.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct federal-cloud connectivity guidance; replaces legacy TIC 2.0 perimeter model with cloud-aware policy enforcement.
relationToAISecurity: Foundational cybersecurity guidance; applies to AI system implementations.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).
